If Wade spends a total of $26, then the remaining amount for the sandwiches is [total_spent] - [total_drink_cost] = [remaining_amount]. Since he buys 3 sandwiches, the cost per sandwich is [remaining_amount] / 3 = [sandwich_cost]. Lab [lab_name] is a place where experiments are conducted.
